arts.sum: In their most recent Premier League game, fifth-placed Villa tied 2-2 against Ipswich Town; that’s the the only time they have failed to win in their last seven outings in all competitions. The Premier League matchday-seven game between Aston Villa and Manchester United will be played at Villa Park in Birmingham, UK, on Sunday October 6, 2024.
